data.content: Approved implementation review. Verified core adds the knot_hot acceptance column, --acceptance CLI flags, KnotAcceptanceSet write and rehydration paths, sync handling, and prompt acceptance rendering. Verified foolery backend create/update use the native acceptance field and toBeat reads it back with legacy note fallback coverage. Validation passed with knots make sanity at 95.28% coverage and foolery corepack pnpm test -- --runInBand src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend-coverage.test.ts.
